title: Bowlorama
description: The bowels from Cracker's Wither Storm Mod as a main menu panorama background.
body:
# Bowlorama

This resource pack simply changes the main menu panorama screen from the stinky default panorama to the beautiful Wither Storm bowels from [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crackers-wither-storm-mod)!
